page.title: lupus nephritis — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for lupus nephritis: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for lupus nephritis: 110 alterations and 235 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
